_comment: gosec finding baseline (v5.26.40). The security-scan workflow runs gosec with the same -exclude/-severity/-confidence flags the operator uses locally, then compares total finding count against this file. CI fails when the live count exceeds the baseline total — i.e. on net-new findings. The 42 findings below are documented and accepted in docs/security-review.md (G115 integer overflow / G703 hardcoded credentials false-positives / G704 SSRF in proxy mode / G118 long-lived goroutine context / G122 G123 misc). To accept a NEW finding: review it (real fix vs. accept-with-rationale), update docs/security-review.md if accepting, then bump the total here AND the by_rule breakdown.
